remake_first.source_title: Chickens have another signal hiding in plain sight
remake_first.action: make sequel with a new animal in the same story shape
instructions: Keep the winning subject promise, but change the first sentence.
Use a different animal or a visibly different angle when possible.
Try another narrative template and narrator variant.
Do not reuse the same source clip.
candidate_titles: Chickens have another signal hiding in plain sight - the part viewers missed
Chickens have another signal hiding in plain sight explained in one detail
Why Chickens have another signal hiding in plain sig works

fixes: Add an action verb such as remember, escape, heal, use, or choose.
Let the hook advance the title instead of repeating it.
Add one visual detail and one because/payoff sentence.
retention_surgery.suggested_hook: Chickens do this for one hidden reason.

rewrite_instructions: Open with the animal plus outcome in the first two seconds.
Remove setup; explain only the mechanism viewers can see or imagine.
Keep the remake shorter than the original if retention was below 62%.
Change the thumbnail promise, not just the wording.
